allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const path=require\('path'\);const dir='src/content/lessons';const set=new Set\(\);fs.readdirSync\(dir\).forEach\(f=>{const txt=fs.readFileSync\(path.join\(dir,f\),'utf8'\);for\(const m of txt.matchAll\(/callout-\(\\w+\)/g\)\)set.add\(m[1]\)}\);console.log\([...set].sort\(\)\)")
